flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at University of Northern Colorado vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.7k vs 7.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Northern Colorado rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.7k → $12.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Northern Colorado fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (6.7k → 5.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Northern Colorado rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.8k → $27.3k).
